rule_metadata.name: PDF_EMBEDDED_DOCM
rule_metadata.description: Find pdf files that have an embedded docm with openaction
rule_metadata.author: Brian Carter

rules.rule_text:
rule PDF_EMBEDDED_DOCM
{
	meta:
		description = "Find pdf files that have an embedded docm with openaction"
		author = "Brian Carter"
		last_modified = "May 11, 2017"

	strings:
		$magic = { 25 50 44 46 2d }
		$txt1 = "EmbeddedFile"
		$txt2 = "docm)"
		$txt3 = "JavaScript" nocase

	condition:
		$magic at 0 and all of ( $txt* )
}
